case_title: MCCLAIN, KAREN vs. ORTIZ, FELIX et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCLAIN, KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, FELIX WIRED WHEELS DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-12-2001 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-13-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-26-2000

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2001, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY SIMS JAMES. HEARING SET FOR FEB-14-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-14-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY JAMES L SIMS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-01-2001 CONTINUED FROM FEB-14-2001 TO APR-18-2001 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-26-2001, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-26-2001, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER KAREN MCCLAIN, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-10-2002 CONTINUED FROM DEC-26-2001 TO FEB-27-2002 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
